name: Takahe
conservationEfforts: Rediscovered in 1948 after being thought extinct. Te Anau Bird Sanctuary breeds birds for release. Predator-free island sanctuaries established. Population growing.
description: A large, flightless bird with vivid blue-green plumage, found only in New Zealand. Thought extinct for 50 years until dramatically rediscovered in the Murchison Mountains in 1948.
